chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 958 of 2024 Alongwith Special Customs Reference Application 959 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.27 2. For orders on CMA No.4299/2024 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.4300/2024 08.10.2025 Mr. Zafar Hussain, advocate for the applicant alongwith Syed Imtiaz Hussain, DC Customs, SAPT and Mr. Tariq Aziz, AC Customs, SAPT Under instructions of the applicant, learned counsel does not press these reference applications, which are dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place a copy of this order in the connected SCRA listed above. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
